ddls:
CREATE TABLE "property_values" (
  "property_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each property */,
  "state_id" INTEGER /* ID of the state where the property is located */,
  "county_id" INTEGER /* ID of the county where the property is located */,
  "address" TEXT /* Full address of the property */,
  "property_type" TEXT /* Type of property (e.g., residential, commercial) */,
  "square_footage" REAL /* Total square footage of the property */,
  "bedrooms" INTEGER /* Number of bedrooms */,
  "bathrooms" INTEGER /* Number of bathrooms */,
  "year_built" INTEGER /* Year the property was built */,
  "last_sold_date" TEXT /* Date the property was last sold */,
  "last_sold_price" REAL /* Price at which the property was last sold */,
  "year_2015" REAL /* Property value in the year 2015 */,
  "year_2014" REAL /* Property value in the year 2014 */,
  "year_2013" REAL /* Property value in the year 2013 */,
  "year_2012" REAL /* Property value in the year 2012 */,
  "year_2011" REAL /* Property value in the year 2011 */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("property_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_property_values_county_id FOREIGN KEY ("county_id") REFERENCES counties ("county_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_property_values_state_id FOREIGN KEY ("state_id") REFERENCES states ("state_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "states" (
  "state_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each state */,
  "state_name" TEXT /* Name of the state */,
  "population" INTEGER /* Population of the state */,
  "GDP" REAL /* Gross Domestic Product (GDP) of the state */,
  "capital" TEXT /* Capital city of the state */,
  "governor" TEXT /* Name of the current governor */,
  "median_income" REAL /* Median household income in the state */,
  "unemployment_rate" REAL /* Unemployment rate in the state */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("state_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "counties" (
  "county_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each county */,
  "county_name" TEXT /* Name of the county */,
  "state_id" INTEGER /* ID of the state where the county is located */,
  "population" INTEGER /* Population of the county */,
  "area" REAL /* Area of the county in square miles */,
  "median_income" REAL /* Median household income in the county */,
  "unemployment_rate" REAL /* Unemployment rate in the county */,
  "crime_rate" REAL /* Crime rate in the county */,
  "school_rating" INTEGER /* Average school rating (1-10) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("county_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "market_trends" (
  "trend_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each market trend */,
  "state_id" INTEGER /* ID of the state where the trend is observed */,
  "county_id" INTEGER /* ID of the county where the trend is observed */,
  "year" INTEGER /* Year for which the trend is observed */,
  "growth_rate" REAL /* Growth rate of property values */,
  "median_home_price" REAL /* Median home price in the market */,
  "new_constructions" INTEGER /* Number of new constructions in the year */,
  "median_days_on_market" INTEGER /* Median number of days properties stay on the market */,
  "inventory_level" INTEGER /* Number of properties available in the market */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("trend_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_market_trends_county_id FOREIGN KEY ("county_id") REFERENCES counties ("county_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_market_trends_state_id FOREIGN KEY ("state_id") REFERENCES states ("state_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., data analyst, researcher, admin) */,
  "phone_number" TEXT /* Phone number of the user */,
  "department" TEXT /* Department the user belongs to */,
  "last_login" TEXT /* Date of the user's last login */,
  "status" TEXT /* User status (e.g., active, inactive) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "reports" (
  "report_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each report */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who generated the report */,
  "state_id" INTEGER /* ID of the state for which the report is generated */,
  "county_id" INTEGER /* ID of the county for which the report is generated */,
  "year" INTEGER /* Year for which the report is generated */,
  "report_file" TEXT /* File path to the generated report */,
  "report_type" TEXT /* Type of report (e.g., market analysis, investment opportunity) */,
  "summary" TEXT /* Summary of the report */,
  "last_updated" TEXT /* Date when the report was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("report_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_reports_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_reports_state_id FOREIGN KEY ("state_id") REFERENCES states ("state_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_reports_county_id FOREIGN KEY ("county_id") REFERENCES counties ("county_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "permissions" (
  "permission_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each permission */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who has the permission */,
  "state_id" INTEGER /* ID of the state for which the permission is granted */,
  "county_id" INTEGER /* ID of the county for which the permission is granted */,
  "permission_level" TEXT /* Level of permission (e.g., read, write, admin) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("permission_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_permissions_county_id FOREIGN KEY ("county_id") REFERENCES counties ("county_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_permissions_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_permissions_state_id FOREIGN KEY ("state_id") REFERENCES states ("state_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "data_access_logs" (
  "access_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access event */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user accessing the data */,
  "state_id" INTEGER /* ID of the state for which the data is accessed */,
  "county_id" INTEGER /* ID of the county for which the data is accessed */,
  "access_date" TEXT /* Date when the data was accessed */,
  "access_type" TEXT /* Type of access (e.g., view, download) */,
  "ip_address" TEXT /* IP address of the user accessing the data */,
  "device_type" TEXT /* Type of device used to access the data (e.g., desktop, mobile) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("access_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_data_access_logs_state_id FOREIGN KEY ("state_id") REFERENCES states ("state_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_data_access_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_data_access_logs_county_id FOREIGN KEY ("county_id") REFERENCES counties ("county_id")
)
